name: Tessa James Elliot
description: A former human who, after the events at the gala at Elliot manor in 2023, died and came back as A worker drone in the year 3033. She is reliving life and learning how to live as A robotic girl with the help of her friends Uzi, V, N, and J, even if she can only remember fragments of her old life.
creator: IMSO_90
